valid_packet.revision_reason: Open-ended discovery tasks require explicit exploratory structure before memory promotion.
valid_packet.research_question: Can staged exploratory analysis improve discovery-memory admission quality for longitudinal animal-care research organization?

dataset_boundary.time_boundary: pre-analysis sources must be separated from post-hypothesis validation sources
dataset_boundary.population_or_system_boundary: research-organization packets for longitudinal human or animal-care observations

measurable_variables.name: unsupported_promotion_rate
measurable_variables.measurement_method: curator review of packets promoted to memory

measurable_variables.name: hypothesis_revision_count
measurable_variables.measurement_method: number of revise or hold decisions before promote

exploratory_steps.purpose: identify allowed evidence and excluded private data
derive multiple candidate explanations without promoting claims
test which observations would change the decision

hypothesis_updates.claim: A staged exploratory gate may reduce unsupported discovery-memory promotion.
hypothesis_updates.evidence_delta: Frontier benchmarks emphasize open-ended exploratory analysis.

hypothesis_updates.claim: Packets with dataset boundaries and staged updates are more reviewable than static claims.
hypothesis_updates.evidence_delta: Synthetic fixture exposes measurable variables and falsification route.

valid_packet.validation_plan: Compare curator agreement and unsupported-promotion rate before and after applying this gate to synthetic and redacted packets.
valid_packet.falsification_route: Reject or revise the gate if curator agreement does not improve or if valid exploratory packets are rejected without actionable error messages.
valid_packet.testability: Run the validator against this fixture and require valid_packet to pass.

invalid_packet_missing_updates.revision_reason: This packet should fail because it has no hypothesis_updates field.
invalid_packet_missing_updates.research_question: Can a static plausible claim be admitted without an exploratory trace?
invalid_packet_missing_updates.validation_plan: No meaningful staged validation plan is present.
invalid_packet_missing_updates.falsification_route: Fail because the update chain is absent.
